description: Configuration for IBM Verify mobile multi-factor authentication (MMFA) integration. These properties are used as a discovery mechanism for mobile devices which have been registered for a user; and is capable of initiating or completing an "out of band" authentication or authorization challenge.

client_id.description: The OAuth client ID required for the MMFA service.

hostname.description: The hostname of the MMFA endpoint URI. Protocol used will be https. Must be configured if 'endpoints' is not included.

port.description: The port of the MMFA endpoint URI. Must be configured if 'endpoints' is not included.

junction.description: The junction of the MMFA endpoint URI. Must be configured if 'endpoints' is not included.

options.description: A list of configurable key-value pairs to be presented in the QR code. Recommended formatting: key=value,key=value.

endpoints.description: An object containing the endpoints returned from the registration QR code or the discovery endpoint. If configured, overwrites 'hostname', 'port', and 'junction' configuration.

discovery_mechanisms.description: A list of authentication mechanism URIs to be included in the discovery endpoint response.

details_url.description: The discovery endpoint included in the registration QR code.

enrollment_endpoint.description: The enrollment endpoint returned from the discovery endpoint.

hotp_shared_secret_endpoint.description: The HOTP shared secret endpoint returned from the discovery endpoint.

totp_shared_secret_endpoint.description: The TOTP shared secret endpoint returned from the discovery endpoint.

qrlogin_endpoint.description: The QR Code login endpoint returned from the discovery endpoint.

token_endpoint.description: The OAuth token endpoint returned from the discovery endpoint.

authntrxn_endpoint.description: The SCIM Transaction endpoint returned from the discovery endpoint.

mobile_endpoint_prefix.description: The prefix of the runtime endpoint that is constructed and saved as the requestUrl of a transaction.
